prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次约 29679→31900→31972→38161→37839，整体呈明显后移趋势，2024 年大幅后移约 6200 名后，2025 年小幅回升约 322 名，2025 年基准约 37839 名；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划 2021 年 104 人、2022 年 105 人、2023 年 104 人、2024 年 105 人、2025 年 107 人，2026 年计划 114 人，较 2025 年扩招约 6.5%，扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 115 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 113–115 名区间，属中游偏下 211 层次；抖音综合热度排名第 59，评价为「较热」，短视频曝光量中等偏上，反映一定报考关注度；声誉文件中未见该校明显负面或投档异常记录，舆情平稳；该校以林业工程、林学、风景 园林为特色，虽第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校，但作为教育部直属的林业类 211 高校，相关农林学科具有行业认可度，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 安徽省物理类考生 2021 年 23.2 万→2022 年 28.6 万→2023 年 29.9 万→2024 年 31.3 万→2025 年 32.1 万，持续增长后 2026 年总考生 45.1 万，估算物理类约 31.3 万，较 2025 年略减约 2.4%，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026 年扩招约 6.5% 以及本省物理类考生略减约 2.4%，扩招对位次的后移压力有对冲作用，但位次后移趋势尚未逆转；在 2025 年基准 37839 名基础上，预计 2026 年最低位次约 39274 名，区间 38774–39774 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 29679 → 31900 → 31972 → 38161 → 37839, showing a clear trend of moving backward. In 2024, it dropped significantly by about 6200 places, then slightly recovered by about 322 places in 2025, with a baseline of about 37839 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for Physics Category was 104 in 2021, 105 in 2022, 104 in 2023, 105 in 2024, 107 in 2025, and 114 in 2026, an increase of about 6.5% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 115th (2026), stable in the 113–115 range in recent years, placing it in the lower-middle tier of 211 universities. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 59th, rated as 'relatively popular', with medium-to-high short video exposure, reflecting a certain level of application interest. No significant negative or abnormal admission records were found in reputation files, and public opinion is stable. The university is known for forestry engineering, forestry, and landscape architecture. Although not included in the fifth round of discipline evaluation data, as a forestry-focused 211 university directly under the Ministry of Education, its related agriculture and forestry disciplines have industry recognition, attracting applicants to relevant majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The number of Physics Category examinees in Anhui Province was 232,000 in 2021 → 286,000 in 2022 → 299,000 in 2023 → 313,000 in 2024 → 321,000 in 2025. After continuous growth, the total number of examinees in 2026 is 451,000, with an estimated Physics Category count of about 313,000, a slight decrease of about 2.4% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure somewhat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.5%, and the slight decrease of about 2.4% in local Physics Category examinees, the expansion offsets some of the backward pressure, but the trend has not reversed. Based on the 2025 baseline of 37839, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 39274, with a range of 38774–39774.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 38774–39774, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices, apply for 2–3 Tier 1 majors as reach options, and use Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 38000), you can prioritize competitive majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper bound (about 39700), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
